title: Tom's Create UI
description: Changes the UI of Tom's Simple Storage to be more in line with the Create Storage Ticker GUI
body:
So, you used the Create Ticker Storage system before, and really liked how it looked! Then you used Tom's Simple Storage, and disliked the boring gray look. If this happened, then this is the resource pack for you!

![Crafting Terminal New GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8633e7b8a8ca5002333b566e6e0d51035530cacb.png)

It changes everything it can from Tom's Simple Storage to fit to the Create Logistic system GUI looks. There are sadly some limitations, the scrollbar and some of the number buttons on the level emitter are still gray, since they use the standard minecraft resources, basically: The more advanced blocks can look a tiny bit off. But it still is fine.

I recommend using the [Not Enough Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughrecipebook) mod to remove the recipe book from the GUI for a better look on the crafting terminal, and I would also like to recommend [this other Create/Toms Simple Storage resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/toms-create-storage) that actually changes the models of the blocks to be more in line with Create. Just make sure to put the pack from this page above the other one in the resourcepack list. It also seems to be a tiny bit broken sometimes? So try it out and see if it works.
